latin: Veritas est ab omnibus agnita: virum divitem, qui bona fortuna gaudet, uxore indigere. hoc omnes matres in vicinia pro certo habebant.

questions.prompt: What does a wealthy man supposedly need?

questions.target: All the mothers in the neighborhood
choices: All the mothers in the neighborhood

translation: It is a truth acknowledged by all: a wealthy man, who enjoys good fortune, must be in need of a wife. All the mothers in the neighborhood held this for certain.
